codeReview.summary: The original feature delivered the required Vitest and Playwright harness foundations with committed 127.0.0.1:3001 startup/baseURL wiring, and the follow-up fix resolves the prior blocking gap by making unit smoke assert route-bearing app surfaces and by replacing brittle browser copy assertions with durable route/title/main-landmark checks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix worker had to abandon a Python-based `.factory/services.yaml` parsing helper because `PyYAML` was unavailable, then fell back to direct repo commands. The skill/procedure should document a dependency-free fallback for reading the services manifest in this environment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session e1ca006d-1dbf-475c-ab5c-e7ec4687f853 and its handoff `skillFeedback.deviations` note the failed Python YAML parsing attempt due to missing `yaml` module before falling back to `pnpm test`.

summary: Pass in milestone synthesis: `validation-foundation-route-smoke-depth-fix` adequately resolves the original blocking finding against `validation-foundation-automated-test-harness`. The combined state now provides committed Vitest and Playwright smoke coverage, keeps browser startup pinned to `127.0.0.1:3001`, makes `pnpm test:unit` fail when required route page surfaces or canonical metadata disappear, and uses more durable browser route assertions instead of exact marketing-copy text.
